w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Senior DevOps and Software Engineer with 26+ years of experience spanning DevOps, platform engineering, and software development across DoD, aerospace, telecommunications, and data center environments. Strong foundation in Python, Java, and C/C++, with broad experience in CI/CD pipelines, containerized platforms, and mission
on expertise with Kubernetes, Docker, Ansible, GitLab, Prometheus, and Grafana for infrastructure automation, deployment workflows, and observability. Extensive experience in secure, air
gapped, and federally regulated environments, including DoD STIG, NIST, and FIPS compliance. U.S. Secret clearance; U.S. Citizen.
C++, Bash, SQL, JavaScript/Node.js (plus Ruby, Perl, Go, PHP, C#/.NET)

CI/CD pipelines, Git, GitLab CI/CD pipelines, GitLab CI, Ansible (Infrastructure as Code), Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Prometheus, Grafana, build and release engineering, artifact repositories (JFrog Artifactory, Nexus)
RESTful, FastAPI, Node.JS API, GitLab API, GitHub API, Nexus API, many other APIs
AWS (GovCloud), Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Azure; Kubernetes, Docker, OpenShift; OpenStack; KVM; VMware vSphere/ESXi/vCenter; Cisco UCS
Agile/Scrum, JIRA, Confluence, Bitbucket, Bamboo, systems integration and testing, Python linting (Ruff, Pylint), unit test frameworks
Satellite telemetry, command and control systems, aeronautical ground stations, RF communications, real-time and embedded systems, video/voice/data platforms
Linux, TCP/IP socket programming, SSH/Telnet, wireless and wired networking, systems and network administration
DoD STIG, NIST, FIPS; secure and air-gapped environments; active U.S. Secret clearance
Served in a dual-role capacity (approximately 50% Software Engineering / 50% DevOps), supporting multiple development teams and program needs.
Supported environments aligned with DoD STIG, NIST, and FIPS compliance requirements.
Worked across on-premises and air-gapped infrastructure, supporting deployments, operations, and cross-environment access and connectivity.
Deployed, administered, and supported GitLab for source control and CI/CD workflows.
Deployed and administered multiple Kubernetes clusters (including OpenShift) and supported containerized workloads using Kubernetes and Docker.
Deployed and administered virtual machines to support development and operational needs.
Deployed and supported observability and data services including Grafana, Prometheus, Kafka, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
Enabled platform access for data science teams by troubleshooting environment issues and tooling dependencies.
Built and maintained software in Python, C/C++, Java, Bash, and Node.js, applying code quality practices using Ruff, Pylint, and unit-testing frameworks.
Supported build automation using Make and Makefiles for repeatable build and deployment workflows.
Worked in an Agile/Scrum environment using JIRA for issue tracking and sprint planning, and Confluence for documentation.
Kratos Defense and Security Solutions | Senior Development Engineer
Environment: AWS GovCloud; private air-gapped RHEL 8 environment using KVM/OpenStack; DoD STIG/NIST/FIPS compliance; Java development supporting a DoD customer; Satellite Operations Center (SOC).
Developed and supported Java and C/C++ solutions for satellite telemetry, command, and control systems, including design, requirements reviews, implementation, and testing in the DoD sector.
Managed C/C++ builds and dependencies using Conan and Make/Makefiles to support repeatable builds across development environments.
Performed DevOps and software engineering work across CI/CD and configuration management using Ansible and Bamboo; supported container platforms using Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenStack.
Worked in Agile/Scrum teams using JIRA for sprint planning, backlog grooming, and issue tracking; used Confluence for documentation and Bit
ucket for source control and code reviews.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines and release automation with Bamboo, integrating builds, tests, and deployments with Bitbucket repositories.
Created and maintained automation in Python and Bash to support build/test workflows, deployment tasks, and operational runbooks.
Tooling: Atlassian suite (Bitbucket, Bamboo, Jira, Confluence).
Kratos Defense and Security Solutions | Senior DevOps Engineer (Development Engineer IV) (Same program; converted to full-time)
Continuation of the same program; converted from Aerotek contract to full-time Kratos employment in March 2022.
Tech stack / environment: Java on RHEL 8; Maven; Conan (C/C++); JFrog Artifactory; Bitbucket; Bamboo; RESTful APIs; DoD STIG/NIST/FIPS compliance.
Supported satellite telemetry/command and control programs through DevOps engineering, build/release automation, and environment management.
Implemented CI/CD and configuration management using Ansible and Bamboo; supported platforms including Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenStack.
Developed automation and tooling using Java, C/C++, Python, and Bash.
Collaborated in an Agile environment using Atlassian tooling (JIRA, Confluence, Bitbucket).
C/C++ applications supporting ground-to-air and air-to-ground communications, including ground station interfaces to radio systems.
Used SVN (Subversion) for source control; participated in design and
reviews, implementation, and testing for real-time communication features.
Worked with real-time operating systems and RF communications (HF bands), including SDR radios, transceivers, codecs, encoding/decoding methods, and command and control signaling.
Developed ACARS and VDL Mode 2 capabilities in C/C++ to enable ground-station-to-aircraft communications.
Contributed to over-the-horizon communications system design and requirements using SDR transceivers, HF radio bands, and digital voice technologies.
Prototyped digital voice communications software and test utilities in C/C++.
Delivered consulting services for 55+ clients, architecting solutions across cloud, networking, and infrastructure.
Installed, configured, and maintained servers, switches, routers, firewalls, storage/backup systems, and related platforms.
ASRC Federal (Contract via Rockhammer) | Senior DevOps Consultant
Architected private cloud infrastructure (hardware and software) aligned to federal security guidelines in an isolated environment.

Designed and improved CI/CD pipeline architecture and automation, integrating RESTful APIs with the Atlassian stack (JIRA, Bitbucket, Confluence), GitLab, Puppet, and artifact management tooling (e.g., Artifactory, Nexus).
Supported containerization and orchestration initiatives using Kubernetes and Docker.
Designed VMware virtualization architecture using vCenter and ESXi following VMware best practices.
Infrastructure: SAN/vSAN disk arrays; data-center switching (e.g., Nexus 6K); fiber/backplane connectivity for private-cloud deployments.
Private cloud design from the ground up including the hardware to support the cloud and the software that runs on the hardware, virtualization layers, and guest OS/software suites.
Charter Communications (and DiSys Contract) | Senior Engineer
Tech stack: Perl, Bash, Ruby, Java; artifact and repository management.
Planned and implemented system changes on EC (DNCS) controllers nationwide and supported related headend components (QAM, QPSK, hubs, Netcrypt).
Built and deployed channel maps, services, and guide data; supported VM deployments and migrations for infrastructure modernization initiatives.

Authored methods of procedure (MOPs) and supported field teams deploying upgraded infrastructure, software, and supporting systems across national data centers (cloud, fiber, coax, and related networks).
Supported a dynamic, multimode network consisting of three large national networks that were combined to operate as one network posing many unique challenges that our team overcame successfully.
AT&T Stress Test Lab | QA Engineer
Tech stack: Puppet, Chef, automation, Python, Java, C/C++, embedded Linux-based OSes, Android OS; repository management.
Stress-tested satellite set-top boxes (STBs) across software downloads, firmware, applications, and core functionality; automated test execution using Jenkins and custom tooling.
Tested Wi‑Fi, Bluetooth, chipsets, and video/audio encoding/decoding (e.g., MP4, H.264, AC3) at scale across 300+ networked STBs on multiple VLANs and RF networks.
Implemented large-scale automated test environments using Puppet, Chef, Ansible, and related tooling to validate set-top boxes, data transmission devices, and RF switching equipment.
Validated embedded Linux and Android-based set-top boxes under constrained resource conditions, covering Java-layer applications and C/C++ components.
Tested a broad range of video devices, including 4K UHD, and executed high-concurrency streaming tests (e.g., 4K to 70+ devices) over GigE networks using configurations such as Apache HTTPd.
Using IPerf and other IP test tools to perform functional IP data/video testing.
Led national deployment engineering for Cloud TV and cross-platform video applications across distributed data-center environments.
Tech stack: C/C++, Java, Maven; VMware (ESXi), RHEL/CentOS/Windows; Docker, Kubernetes, CoreOS; RESTful APIs.
Deployed, configured, and operationalized data-center platforms nationwide, including video pumps, Cisco UCS, NetApp disk arrays, vSAN systems, and multi-purpose server fleets.
Automated testing and configuration of deployed devices using Python and Perl; used SSH/Telnet to remotely access equipment and execute automated deployment/validation workflows.
Deployed products and services nationwide across data centers and carrier-neutral facilities; performed upgrades to DACs and DNCS controllers supporting set-top-box ecosystems.
Supported infrastructure including Cisco UCS, VMware components (ESXi, vCenter), NetApp storage, video recorders/archivers, and network switching.
Worked with Kubernetes/CoreOS and additional platform tooling in support of modernized deployment approaches.
— M.Eng., Software Engineering (in progress; started Jan 2026; expected 2028)
U.S. Secret security clearance; eligible for upgrade.
Extra Class Ham Radio Operator: KC8GIJ.
